network_summary: Areo Dental Group, co-founded by Dr. Abhishek Nagaraj and Dr. Anushka Gaglani (husband-and-wife dentists), is an explicitly self-identified dental support organization (DSO) based in the Chicago area, Inc. 5000-ranked for multiple consecutive years. The group operates under a dental partnership/support structure with a management layer (Areo Dental Group entity). All four AO-clustered IL GP locations are confirmed Areo Dental member practices: Blue Island Smiles (NPPES 'BLUE ISLAND SMILES PC'), TruBlu Dentistry Burbank (NPPES 'TRUE DENTISTRY'), Steger Smiles (NPPES 'STEGER SMILES PC'), and TruBlu Dentistry Hegewisch/Chicago (NPPES 'TITAN DENTAL PC', same address 13247 S Baltimore Ave). No private equity backing — explicitly bootstrapped and debt-financed. Six total locations in IL and Indiana as of 2024 ADA profile.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Abhishek Nagaraj DDS, Co-Founder & Co-CEO, Areo Dental Group; co-led with Dr. Anushka Gaglani DDS, Co-Founder & Co-CEO (husband-and-wife team)
durable_artifacts: Shared authorized official ABHISHEK NAGARAJ across NPIs 1942842810, 1710358692, 1043716863, 1316463375 spanning ZIPs 60406, 60459, 60475, 60633

areodental.com/locations lists Blue Island Smiles (12059 Western Ave, Blue Island 60406), TruBlu Dentistry Burbank (5307 W 79th St, Burbank 60459), TruBlu Dentistry Hegewisch (13247 S Baltimore Ave, Chicago 60633), Steger Smiles (3112 Union Ave, Steger 60475) — exact address+phone match to all four NPPES records
ADA News May 2024 'Emerging Dental Groups to Watch' lists Areo Dental Group with these six nonbranded practices (four in IL watched ZIPs)
Group Dentistry Now DSO growth feature: 'Areo Dental Group' named as DSO, bootstrapped, no PE
Inc. 5000 Regionals Midwest Award — Areo Dental Group multiple years

TITAN DENTAL PC (NPI 1316463375) and TruBlu Dentistry Hegewisch share address 13247 S Baltimore Ave, Chicago 60633 and phone (773) 646-4664 — same physical location different NPPES vs consumer brand name
mso_platform_pe_evidence: Areo Dental Group operates as an explicit dental support organization / dental partnership entity with a centralized management layer. Per ADA News (May 2024, https://adanews.ada.org/ada-news/2024/may/emerging-dental-groups-to-watch/) and Group Dentistry Now webinar (https://www.groupdentistrynow.com/dso-group-blog/live-webinar-emerging-dso-growth-how-aero-dental-grew-20-with-connected-technology/): 'dentist-led dental support organization,' Inc. 5000-ranked, 40+ employees across locations. No PE — explicitly 'debt-financed and bootstrapped and has no private equity backing.' MSO/management platform is the Areo Dental Group entity itself (areodental.com), which provides operational support and tech to member practices.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: TITAN DENTAL PC is the NPPES legal entity name for TruBlu Dentistry Hegewisch at 13247 S Baltimore Ave, Chicago 60633 — the consumer-facing brand is TruBlu Dentistry. No evidence of closure. All four IL locations show active phones and appear on the areodental.com/locations page.
evidence_chain: AO signal: ABHISHEK NAGARAJ is the authorized official on 4 NPPES organizational NPIs across 4 distinct Chicagoland ZIPs (60406, 60459, 60475, 60633). Documentary corroboration: areodental.com/locations lists exact address+phone matches for all four practices under the Areo Dental Group DSO platform. ADA News May 2024 'Emerging Dental Groups to Watch' independently names Areo Dental Group as a DSO with these same six nonbranded practices. Group Dentistry Now and ZoomInfo confirm Dr. Abhishek Nagaraj as Co-CEO. No PE: ADA article states 'debt-financed and bootstrapped and has no private equity backing.'
future_app_notes: Areo Dental Group has two additional IL/Indiana locations (St. John Smiles, Crown Point Smiles) outside watched ZIPs — worth monitoring if ZIPs ever expand. The NPPES legal names (Blue Island Smiles PC, True Dentistry, Steger Smiles PC, Titan Dental PC) diverge from the consumer brand names (Blue Island Smiles, TruBlu Dentistry Burbank, Steger Smiles, TruBlu Dentistry Hegewisch) — future NPPES queries should cross-reference areodental.com/locations for brand resolution. Dr. Anushka Gaglani may also appear as AO on these or other Areo Dental NPIs. PE watch: currently bootstrapped; track for future PE entry as group continues Inc. 5000 growth trajectory.
